title: LARDUX 24 Pcs Glitter Roses Bouquet, Valentine's Day Artificial Rose Flowers Bouquet,DIY Fake Glitter Bouquets with Crown for gifts Wedding Anniversary Engagement Birthday,Mother's Day (Light pink)
features: Stunning diy designs: Our glitter rose bouquet features 24 artificial roses, crown, 32cm stem, wrapping paper, cut-out butterflies, and gold ribbon tape, bring joy to your loved ones with a handmade bouquet that embodies thoughtfulness and creativity, making it a meaningful and memorable gift.

Quality Craftsmanship: Each rose in the glitter flowers is made from premium materials that are durable and ensure your beautiful blooms will last for years to come. Topped with a delicate layer of glitter, its vibrant colours and enchanting glitter effect will brighten up your special moments.

Versatile: Not only does it make a timeless gift, it can also be used as an elegant decoration, whether as a symbol of appreciation, a gesture of love, or a display of festive cheer, these glitter roses bouquetare sure to bring a smile to a loved one's face.

Perfect for DIY rose bouquets: Make your own unique flower arrangements with our DIY fake glitter rose bouquets. The easy-to-stylise design allows for endless creativity in your home or event decor. Bring joy to your loved ones with a handmade bouquet that embodies thoughtfulness and creativity, making it a meaningful and memorable gift.

The Perfect Gift: DIY Glitter Rose Bouquet is the ideal gift for the dearest women in your life on every important occasion. It is the perfect gift for Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, anniversaries, graduations, birthdays, engagements, weddings and more.
